title: Kissing And Bussing.
content:
Kissing and bussing differ both in this;
    We buss our wantons, but our wives we kiss.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Kissing And Bussing.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
